context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready export audit fixed Silo public SDK subpaths after Heartwood; selected packages remain preflight-ready and covered by changesets.
current_tasks: Commit 5a4f3dce exposes @refarm.dev/silo ./collect and ./key-manager as typed package exports matching the files already published in the allowlist.
scripts/validate-packages.mjs now rejects missing Silo public SDK subpath exports, with coverage in scripts/ci/test-validate-packages-lib.mjs.

Validated node --test scripts/ci/test-validate-packages-lib.mjs, pnpm run validate-packages, pnpm -C packages/silo run build, pnpm -C packages/silo run test, Node package-export import probes, refarm release preflight --selection vault-seed-ready --json, git diff --check, and after-commit finish.
The Silo after-commit package lint/build hit turbo cache 4/4; no broad release dry-run or heavy gate was repeated.
next_actions: Continue auditing vault-seed-ready SDK exports and consumer-facing naming before publication, especially release-engine, ds, homestead-ssr, launch-process, and dispatch-surface.
When ready for heavier evidence, run pnpm run release:vault-seed:check once; it performs package publish dry-runs for the 10 selected packages and should not be repeated unnecessarily.
For agents-as-tools, consume assessWorkerToolReadiness() as the promotion gate; implement runtime-dispatch only after policy, cancellation, observability, and cost-control proofs are local and cheap.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
